CheckTitle: Okta Smart Card authenticator is active
Description: The Smart Card IdP authenticator should be configured and active for certificate-based authentication scenarios required by the STIG.
Risk: If Smart Card authentication is unavailable, users cannot satisfy certificate-based authentication requirements where mandated.

Code.Other: Security > Authenticators: add or activate the Smart Card IdP authenticator.

Recommendation.Text: Configure and activate the Smart Card IdP authenticator in Okta.
